## The flagged text

```
Paste the text that was incorrectly flagged
```

## Which rule triggered?

Rule file and pattern number (e.g., text-language.md #7)

## Why this is legitimate

Explain why this is normal human writing in this context. Include the context — a word flagged in a blog post might be fine in an academic paper.
